data.description:
Goal:
Refine the beat overview by removing the redundant State overview/count header row, expanding active lease rows with provider/agent/model/version metadata, and adding an action that focuses the matching terminal session when available or releases the beat by rolling it back when no session exists.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run lint` and expect success.
2. Run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and expect success.
3. Run `bun run test` and expect success.
4. Run `bun run build` and expect success.
5. Open `http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview&state=queued` with All Repositories selected and confirm the redundant State overview/count row is gone, tabs remain, active lease tiles show lease age plus provider/agent/model/version metadata, and the tile shows either a focus-session action or a Release action when no terminal session exists.
6. For the Release action, verify the client calls the existing rollback path for the beat/repo scope rather than inventing a new state mutation.

Constraints:
Keep the overview read-only except for the explicit Release action. Preserve existing tabs, hidden empty columns, all-repo full ids, single-repo abbreviated ids, lease filtering, active lease info behavior, and column sizing behavior.
